purpose: Source-backed data engineering workflow for collecting, cleaning, exporting, and analyzing B2B product listings.
workflow: Scrapy spider with category and sub-category discovery
Controlled concurrency, retry handling, request caching, and download throttling
Data cleaning for text fields, price defaults, and absolute product URLs
Category-partitioned CSV outputs plus combined EDA-ready dataset
eda_findings: Only 7.8% of products had listed prices, matching the B2B pattern of price-on-request discovery.
Mumbai led supplier coverage with 274 products, followed by New Delhi with 161.
Supplier information was present for 77% of records, while MOQ completeness was low.
